name: AnalysisNodeLink
summary: The AnalysisNodeLink class contains information related to analysis node links.

constructors.name: AnalysisNodeLink
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisNodeLink class.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes a user analysis node link. The ID has to be set.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Inserts a user analysis node link. The AnalysisModelName has to be set. The StartNodeID has to be set. The EndNodeID has to be set.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies an analysis node link. The ID has to be set.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects an analysis node link. The ID has to be set.

properties.name: AnalysisModelName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model name.

properties.name: AnalysisObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the analysis object.

properties.name: CoordinateSystem
properties.summary: The coordinate system of the analysis node link.

properties.name: Disabled
properties.summary: Indicates whether the analysis node link is disabled.

properties.name: EndConnectivity
properties.summary: The end connectivity of the analysis node link.

properties.name: FatherObject2ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObject2Type
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: FatherObjectID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the analysis object.

properties.name: IsUserConnectivity
properties.summary: Indicates whether the analysis node has a user defined connectivity.

properties.name: IsUserNodeLink
properties.summary: Indicates whether the analysis node is a user node link.

properties.name: OwnerPartIDs
properties.summary: The list of the identifiers of the owner parts.

properties.name: StartConnectivity
properties.summary: The start connectivity of the analysis node link.
